key.name: command
key.description: Legacy command setting kept for upgrades. Server profiles are used by the extension.

key.name: workdir
key.description: Legacy working directory setting kept for upgrades. Server profiles are used by the extension.

key.name: process-pattern
key.description: Regular expression used by pgrep and pkill to detect or stop externally started servers.

key.name: refresh-rate
key.description: Process status refresh interval in seconds.

key.name: position
key.description: Panel position: left, center, or right.

key.name: show-eval-tps
key.summary: Show generation tokens per second in panel

key.name: show-prompt-tps
key.summary: Show prompt tokens per second in panel

key.name: show-eval-tokens
key.summary: Show generated token count in panel

key.name: show-prompt-tokens
key.summary: Show prompt token count in panel

key.name: show-total-tokens
key.summary: Show total token count in panel

key.name: show-slot-task
key.summary: Show slot and task in panel
